targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, score AS "Score"
FROM (
  SELECT (fecha + (hora_local || ' hours')::interval) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Madrid' AS time, score
  FROM recomendaciones_horarias
) sub
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Recomendación actividades costeras (A Coruña) en el tiempo

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, wind_kmh AS "Viento (km/h)", wave_height_m AS "Oleaje (m)"
FROM (
  SELECT (fecha + (hora_local || ' hours')::interval) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Madrid' AS time, wind_kmh, wave_height_m
  FROM recomendaciones_horarias
) sub
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  (fecha + (hora_local || ' hours')::interval) AS "Fecha",
  hora_local AS "Hora",
  score AS "Score",
  wind_kmh AS "Viento km/h",
  wave_height_m AS "Oleaje m",
  precipitacion_mm AS "Precip. mm",
  LEFT(explicacion, 80) AS "Explicación"
FROM recomendaciones_horarias
ORDER BY created_at DESC, fecha DESC, hora_local DESC
LIMIT 25
